text.zh: AlphaZero 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: AlphaZero is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: AlphaZero 展示了同一套自我博弈强化学习系统可以仅凭游戏规则掌握围棋、国际象棋和将棋。它用神经网络的策略-价值学习和蒙特卡洛树搜索取代人工评估函数与开局库，让棋牌游戏 AI 从单一游戏程序走向通用方法。
text.en: AlphaZero showed that one self-play reinforcement learning system could master Go, chess, and shogi from game rules alone. It replaced handcrafted evaluation and opening books with neural policy-value learning plus Monte Carlo tree search, turning board-game AI into a general recipe rather than a single-game program.
